steps.t: Mulnír has asked you to speak to gather the men around the Foothold in Udûn, and tell them where to meet.
Mulnír has asked you to collect what personal belongings of Captain Lachír you could find around the Foothold camp in Udûn.
You should meet Mulnír and the other men up on the high platform across the road from the Udûn Foothold.
You should talk to Mulnír on the platform where the men have gathered to mourn Captain Lachír, across the road from the Foothold in Udûn.
The mourners are gathered on the high platform across the road from the Udûn Foothold. You should lay the Captain's belongings in the middle of the ci…
The mourners are gathered on the high platform across the road from the Udûn Foothold. Listen to Barathron speak.
The mourners are gathered on the high platform across the road from the Udûn Foothold. Hear Coldan's memory of Lachír.
The mourners are gathered on the high platform across the road from the Udûn Foothold. Hear Othras' memory of Lachír.
The mourners are gathered on the high platform across the road from the Udûn Foothold. You should talk to Mulnír again.
You should return to the Foothold in Udûn now that the gathering to remember Lachír is over.
You should talk to Mulnír in the Foothold camp in Udûn.
